assertions.title: Low-confidence detections are filtered out

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:5173 and clear localStorage
steps.observed: App loaded successfully, default policy 'renters' selected

steps.action: Click Camera tab to navigate to camera view
steps.expected: Camera view loads with video feed and confidence slider
steps.observed: Page shows 'Loading AI Model...' state indefinitely

steps.action: Wait for MediaPipe model to load from CDN (15+ seconds)
steps.expected: Model loads and camera view appears with confidence slider
steps.observed: Model loading still in progress after extended wait

steps.action: Attempt to inject mock detections via JavaScript
steps.expected: Mock detections appear, allowing slider testing
steps.observed: Could not inject mock state into React internals

evidence.consoleErrors: Model loading timeout - MediaPipe WASM/model fetch from CDN not completing
evidence.network: No visible MediaPipe-related network requests completed

assertions.issues: MediaPipe object detection model (efficientdet_lite0_uint8.tflite) loading from Google Cloud Storage CDN is not completing in the headless browser environment. The model initialization requires fetching WASM files from cdn.jsdelivr.net and the model file from storage.googleapis.com. Extended wait times (15+ seconds) did not result in successful loading. This prevents the camera view from rendering, which in turn prevents access to the ConfidenceThresholdSlider component that is rendered within the CameraView component.

frictions.description: MediaPipe model loading from CDN is unreliable in headless browser environment - requires alternative approach for testing confidence threshold slider

blockers.description: MediaPipe object detection model fails to load from CDN in headless browser after 15+ seconds of waiting. CameraView remains in 'Loading AI Model...' state. ConfidenceThresholdSlider is only rendered when isLoaded=true and no errors exist.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: 1) Waited 15+ seconds for model load, 2) Attempted to inject mock React state via JavaScript, 3) Checked for test/demo mode in codebase - none found

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 0 passed, 0 failed, 1 blocked (VAL-OVERLAY-014). The confidence threshold slider cannot be tested because the MediaPipe object detection model from CDN is not loading in the headless browser environment, preventing the CameraView component from rendering. The slider component exists in the codebase (src/components/ConfidenceThresholdSlider/ConfidenceThresholdSlider.jsx) with range 0.1-0.9 and default 0.5, but is only accessible once the model loads successfully.
